title: Netherite Mace
description: A fireproof Mace for your convenience.
body:
![Netherite Mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3483b420418cc1ce89eab44993c9a41eb6485d6e.png)

## Description
Do you love your Mace, but hate how it always gets destroyed when you expose it to fire? This mod adds a Netherite-Reinforced Mace that is fireproof.

### Features:
- Create a Netherite-Reinforced Mace by combining a Netherite Upgrade Template, a Netherite Ingot, and a Mace in the Smithing Table
- More difficult recipe added if [Slow Your Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/slow-your-roll) is installed (version 1.21.4-1.0.2)
- In-game documentation is available via [Treatise](https://modrinth.com/mod/treatise) if installed

For inquiries, email dentedmodding@gmail.com. For issues, report on GitHub issues page.

See below for a short video tutorial from our [YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/@dentedleftgaming).

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/1_0VIhJkoU8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Support
Looking for a Forge port? Check out [Reforged Netherite Mace](https://modrinth.com/mod/reforged-netherite-mace) by Binaris00.

If you have a bug report, feature request, or any other type of issue, please post on our GitHub [issues page](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/issues).  This is an issues page for all of our mods, so be sure to include the mod's name and version in your post.  We appreciate all feedback!

If you'd like to support development, you can leave a tip at our [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/dentedleft).  Only if it's within your means- otherwise, using, sharing, and enjoying the mod is support enough.  Thank you!
